## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Coris and GrowthX to explore potential AI-driven content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Coris seeks to improve content quality, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness for their LinkedIn-focused strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human oversight, emphasizing editorial quality and SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [GrowthX's typical engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K), followed by optional 12-month engagement ($15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach aims to help brands operate like publishers, with a focus on driving organic traffic and eventual revenue impact](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Current Coris Marketing Efforts

  - [Primary focus on LinkedIn content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Using an agency for LinkedIn content, but facing challenges with manual processes and quality](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Tried outbound marketing last year with limited success](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Warm outbound and inbound driven by LinkedIn recognition](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Software-as-a-service model with agency-like delivery](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Team includes high-caliber professionals (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Emphasis on editorial content creation, typically 5-15 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Modular workflows leveraging various AI APIs (Perplexity, OpenAI)](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Deep research generation for comprehensive, persona-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Structure

  - [Initial 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) to develop roadmap and align on goals](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Typical 12-month engagement at $15K/month following strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Focus on establishing editorial foundation before expanding to conversion tactics](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Gradual approach to driving revenue impact, with early emphasis on traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Client Success Story: Tiro

  - [Started engagement in January with no existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Achieved significant traffic growth within months](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Now exploring lead magnets, CTAs, and conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send base Statement of Work (SoW) for Coris to review](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [GrowthX to share meeting notes and recording](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Potential further discussion on specific opportunities for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/8X5hNa68nvuTFoWFqBzHR3UBsTnEEy_X?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
